text_block_list.name: Local A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this month's Twinkle Monthly is out. I knew
the Oka Sho feature was gonna be huge.

text_block_list.name: Local B
text_block_list.text:
But the Satsuki Sho winner was really something!
...What was her name again?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Jordan! Those nails you uploaded yesterday
were totally adorbs! Like, I'm obsessed!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I know, right? You get it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ready... go!

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Besties... ♪

text_block_list.name: Jordan and Friends
text_block_list.text: Unite! ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, was that great or what? I'm gonna upload it
to UmaTok.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan! Did you forget about your math
lesson?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Run away! ☆

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Yeeeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: Hey! That's it! I'll be speaking with your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What?! Is that really necessary?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, well if it isn't Tosen Jordan. Sup?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ew, no. Hearing you say my full name just sounds
weird.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Haha, okay then, Jordan, I—

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my gosh. Is that Jordan... with City?! That's,
like, the strongest combo ever!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Looks like you've got some admirers. Keep it
up, Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Get it, Jordaaan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm attending some lectures for trainers
given by special guests on the outdoor stage.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer <username>?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a fellow trainer who joined Tracen at the
same time as me. We both work hard to push
each other to be better trainers.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Are you attending "A New Proposal for Training
Cleats"?
choice_data_list: I am. I'm also going to—

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't tell me! You're going to "Useful
Plyometrics" and "Racing Patterns and
Competitive Thinking" too?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Great! I am too! Shall we go together?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking we could compare notes in case it's
too difficult to keep up.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
How to overtake front runners from their tells.
Practice predicting movement in pairs, with one
running in front of the other... Hm.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Meek is good as both a pace chaser and a late
surger, so this training should be effective for her!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer <username>! If
it's okay with you, why don't we try out the
method together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't have hoped for a better suggestion.
Tosen Jordan is also a great pace chaser and late
surger. This training certainly won't hurt.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Tosen Jordan and I team up with Trainer
Kiryuin and her trainee, Happy Meek, for a joint
training session.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Hello.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Meek. Today, I'd like the two of you to practice
taking the lead after the third corner.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
One of you will sit back until the final corner and
watch for the tells of the other.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
See whether she moves to the inside or outside,
how she shifts her weight... Then, use those tells
to determine how to best overtake her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa. That's, like, next level. Way over my head.
choice_data_list:
Do you think you could break it down a little
more?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh! G-good idea. Apologies. Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Trainer. You don't have to force
yourself to simplify it.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I want to understand what you said... I'll study the
difficult words too.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...Meek.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so did you get what she was saying back
there? 'Cause for me, it literally went in one ear
and out the other.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: ...It was really hard.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: But my trainer works really hard for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
I... want to match that. Even though it's hard, I
have to work hard too.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...But like, aren't there times when you just can't
understand even though you really want to?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What do you do then?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? Are we doing it now? Or...
choice_data_list: You know what to look for?
You know what to look for?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uhh, I mean...
choice_data_list:
If her ears move on the fourth corner, book it on
her inside.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Her ears?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Is it really that simple? Is that what all that
shifting weight and tells stuff was about?
choice_data_list: You don't have to think too hard about it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They begin the exercise, and it's Tosen Jordan's
turn to pass this time.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
If the front runner makes a front runner telling
move... It's possible to confuse the opponent
and... uh?

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Her footsteps don't sound any closer. Is
she... not planning to pass? Then, I guess...

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I just make a break for it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Her ears turned this way on the fourth corner!
That means...)

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: She's making a move! I can't let her... Huh? Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the fourth corner, Happy Meek pins her ears
and accelerates, but centrifugal force drives her
farther and farther to the outside.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With no obstacles left in front of her, Tosen
Jordan rides the rail straight through the finish
line!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>. Was
that...
choice_data_list:
The strategy only works in a very specific
situation, but...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's true that the inside tends to open up if they
sprint on the fourth corner. Centrifugal force will
push them to the outside no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
And it's true that many Umamusume instinctively
pin back their ears when they're about to sprint...
including Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's as simple as can be when you think about it. I
was so fixated on what we heard in the lecture
that I forgot a basic tell like that.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
She passed me, Trainer... Even though you taught
me what to do...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: ...Meek.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: It's not your fault. I should be apologizing to you.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
This has been an eye-opening exercise. Why don't
we go over it when we get back? There's so much
I'd like to teach you.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'd like that. I want to understand what you
were trying to teach me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So our joint training comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: You're mad smart, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
In the end, it was your strength that allowed
you to pass her.

In the end, it was your strength that allowed
you to pass her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's the problem with you. Learn to take the
compliment, fam.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, you are super smart. Like, for real.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...If only I could understand all your strategies, maybe
I'd be a stronger runner.
